title: Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with Sunrise for IT Transformation and AI Readiness
detailed_summary: Infosys announced an expansion of its strategic long-term collaboration with Sunrise to accelerate Sunrise's IT transformation. Infosys will support Sunrise in building a modern, agile, and secure technology foundation focused on customer-centric innovation, data security, operational agility, and future AI integration. The work includes end-to-end IT services, consolidation of multiple vendors into a unified portfolio, application transition, and use of Infosys expertise in AI, analytics, data, and elements of Infosys Topaz to help Sunrise become an AI-powered organization. No contract value or financial impact was disclosed.
